description: Hosting the NHL Winter Classic at your bar or restaurant? Let you fans know they can leave the hosting to you this time and all the details about your event. Show case last years match and a few drink specials they can expect when they reserve a table.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
SATURDAY, JANUARY 1

DONT MISS THE NHL WINTER CLASSIC AT "YOUR BAR NAME"

BOOK YOUR TABLE
 
 

JOIN US FOR THE 2021 - 2022 NHL WINTER CLASSIC

Let us do the hosting this year! Head over to "Your Bar Name" on January 1st for some hockey, drinks, and good times.

 
 
 

VS.

 
 

1111 Street, City, State Zip  |  Pre-Show starts at 4 PM CST

 
 
 

2020 RECAP

Here's a look back at the 2020 NHL Winter Classic. We're ready for another exciting game and can't wait to cheer your teams on with you!

 

BOOK YOUR TABLE FOR THE 2021 NHL WINTER CLASSIC WATCH PARTY TODAY!
